zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Prideaux I於1224年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Geoffry de Pridyas25歲，母親Isabella Montacute31歲。他於1245年與Gilda de Banco在英國素瑞阿德萊斯同結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1273年被列為sherrif of devon。他去世於1302年享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Prideaux I于1224年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Geoffry de Pridyas25岁，母亲Isabella Montacute31岁。他于1245年与Gilda de Banco在英国素瑞阿德萊斯同结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1273年被列为sherrif of devon。他去世于1302年享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Prideaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from a place in the parish of Luxulyan, or perhaps the placename derives from the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Prideaux I was born in 1224, in Devon, England, his father, Geoffry de Pridyas, was 25 and his mother, Isabella Montacute, was 31. He married Gilda de Banco in 1245, in Addlestone, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. In 1273, at the age of 49, his occupation is listed as sherrif of devon. He died in 1302, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Prideaux I est né en 1224, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Geoffry de Pridyas, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabella Montacute, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Gilda de Banco en 1245, à Addlestone, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. En 1273, à l’âge de 49 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sherrif of devon. Il est décédé en 1302, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Prideaux I 1224 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffry de Pridyas 25 und seine Mutter Isabella Montacute 31. Er hat 1245 in Addlestone, Surrey, England Gilda de Banco geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1273, als er 49 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sherrif of devon aufgeführt. Er starb 1302 im Alter von 78 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Prideaux I è nato il nel 1224 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Geoffry de Pridyas, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Montacute, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Gilda de Banco nel 1245, nel Addlestone, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1273, all'età di 49 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sherrif of devon. Morì nel 1302, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Prideaux Iが1224年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Geoffry de Pridyasは25歳，母Isabella Montacuteは31歳であった。1245年にイギリススリーアッドレストーンでGilda de Bancoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1273年，49歳の時，職業はsherrif of devonと記録されている。彼は1302年に78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Prideaux I(이)가 1224년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffry de Pridyas(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Montacute(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1245년 영국 수리 애들레스톤에서 Gilda de Banco(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1273년, 49세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sherrif of devon이었다. 그는 1302년 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Prideaux I nasceu em 1224, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffry de Pridyas, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Montacute, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Gilda de Banco em 1245, em Addlestone, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1273, com 49 anos, sua profissão aparece como sherrif of devon. Ele faleceu em 1302, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Prideaux I родился в 1224 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffry de Pridyas было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Montacute, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Gilda de Banco в 1245 г. в местности аддлестоун, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. В 1273 году, в возрасте 49 лет,  он работал по профессии sherrif of devon. Он умер в 1302 г. в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Prideaux I nació en 1224, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffry de Pridyas, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Isabella Montacute, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Gilda de Banco en 1245, en Addlestone, Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1273, a la edad de 49 años, su ocupación registrada era sherrif of devon. Murió en 1302, a la edad de 78 años.
